name: PATENT_COUNT_BY_ASSIGNEE_AND_FUNCTION
description: Count patents for one assignee in one functional/technology class.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f:Functional_of_Target) WHERE toLower(a.name) = toLower($assignee) AND toLower(f.name) = toLower($function) RETURN a.name AS assignee, f.name AS function, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count LIMIT 1;
